name: com.rootsbybenda/chemical-safety
description: Chemical safety and industrial regulatory intelligence. Look up any chemical by name or CAS number — get SVHC status, NIOSH occupational exposure data, GHS hazard classification, and ICSC safety cards. 468,165 GHS classifications, 253 SVHC substances, 677 NIOSH profiles. Free. Source-linked.

tools.name: check_chemical
tools.description: Look up a chemical by name or CAS number. Returns SVHC status, NIOSH occupational exposure data (REL/PEL/IDLH), GHS hazard classification, and ICSC safety card data.

tools.name: check_svhc_list
tools.description: Screen up to 50 substances against the EU ECHA SVHC Candidate List. Returns which are flagged and why.

tools.name: search_chemicals
tools.description: Search chemical safety databases by keyword, hazard type, target organ, or symptom across SVHC, NIOSH, GHS, and ICSC.
